name: Explicit Call to Finalize()
description: The product explicitly calls finalize() from outside the finalizer. This causes finalize() to execute multiple times -- once from the explicit call and again during garbage collection -- leading to unexpected state, double resource release, or quality degradation.
detection_pattern: EXTERNAL call node that explicitly invokes finalize() on an object outside of a finalize() method definition. Look for direct invocations of object.finalize() in normal code flow rather than within the finalizer itself.
